endingNarration.title: The Silence of Eldrath
narration: The echo of your blade fades, leaving only the stillness of absolute victory.
No screams answer the wind, no whispers dare defy your might.
The Shadow King's reign ended not with a whimper, but with a final, crushing blow.
Eldrath is saved, but the cost was every soul that stood in your path.
endingNarration.epilogue: With the land cleansed of all life, you stand as the sole, silent ruler of a kingdom reborn in your image.

storySummary: Room 1: "Whispering Woods Edge" — The wind howls through skeletal trees, carrying the scent of damp earth and forgotten sorrow.
Room 2: "Shadowy Archives" — Dust motes dance in the oppressive gloom, illuminated by faint, flickering arcane energies.
Room 3: "Throne of Despair" — The air crackles with dark energy as you stand before the Shadow King, the culmination of your arduous journey.
